items.name: Psychokinesis Glove
items.description: Move things with your mind...no problem. Okay you're actually moving it with the glove, but no one else has to know that.  Picks up near by players and rocks and hurls them to the ground.

items.name: Wizards of the Astral Isles: Frog Transformer
items.description: Transform those around you into frogs. They'll be forced to hop around and drop all of their weapons!

items.name: Zombie Attack Bunny
items.description: You're nobody till somebunny bites you. Summon a zombie bunny by your side that will hop after and attack enemy that gets too close. He's loyal and will walk wherever you click nearby and attack anybody you wish!

items.name: Ghostly Possessed Sword of Terror
items.description: A ghostly sword, possessed by the souls of slain warriors, thirsty for revenge...Click to release its binding and it attacks on its own.

items.name: Light Face Melting Guitar
items.description: That heavenly sound that will bring the house (and people's faces) down.

items.name: billylones' ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: billylones. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Sword of the Highlander
items.description:
And there's fire in the glen, fire in the glen /
But no fire in the eyes of our Highland men

items.name: Banjo
items.description:
I want to be a rock star, and travel really far, and buy / me a big expensive car. /
And make lots of money and find me a honey. /
And live in nice big house where it's sunny. /
With a pool and I'll be cool. /
I'll always have a gig cause I'll be big. /
I'll have parties and friends and places to go, /
The only problem is I play the banjo. - Ryan Shupe

items.name: Suit Up Gun
items.description: Bunny suit up! Dress other players in one of four embarrassing outfits.

items.name: Orbital Flute Strike
items.description: Imagine for a moment, you are peacefully playing a beautiful melody on your flute, when suddenly you see a flaming missile.  You realize that you are controlling its direction with your sweet music.  Where do you send it? That choice is yours and yours alone.

items.name: Cupid's Beloved Blade
items.description: In addition to dealing five points of damage per strike, this blade turns your opponent into a lovely shade of pink! Double tap "W" for a spin attack, double click for a homing attack, or press "A", "W", then "D" for a "pinksplosion"! Each special attack does 10 hit points of damage.

items.name: Lightning Orb
items.description: Summon lightning to stun your enemies!

items.name: Gold Eagle Sword
items.description: A very stylish and patriotic sword, which you can run around with, making a red, white, and blue striped trail behind your character! Slash at your enemies, dealing about 20 damage per hit. If you blox someone with this an eagle swoops down from the sky and grabs your enemy and flies him away!

items.name: 2018 Noisemaker
items.description: The louder your new year, the better your year will be. That's just science.

items.name: Scatterblaster
items.description: Think of it as a one-handed shotgun from the future. Good against masses of enemies, especially in tight corridors.

items.name: Victrola
items.description: Play that old timey song and create a sonic blast - blowing people back and doing 20 damage.

items.name: Emergency Rations
items.description: Increases your max health by 100 points.

items.name: Polar Bear Cub
items.description: All the fun of a polar bear with none of the aggression.

items.name: 4th of July 2016 Fireworks
items.description: Ignite the sky with these festive fireworks!

items.name: Staff of Healing
items.description: Asclepius, son of Apollo, Greek god of medicine grants his power to this staff. Click to heroically heal the injured.

items.name: ROBLOXIAN Healing Orb
items.description: Heal yourself with this glowing green orb.  No need to heal right now?  Drop healing orbs around a game and pick them up as needed. Why green?  Everyone knows that green is the color of healing...duh.

items.name: Incinerator 6000
items.description: Why 6000?  Because it shoots fireballs that are a solid 6000 degrees of burning power.  Hold the mouse to charge your shot for maximum fire power!  This fire will damage any player it touches - doing 70 damage over 5 seconds.

items.name: Orinthian Blaster 3777
items.description: Blast your enemies into the next galaxy  with the Orinthian blaster.  Does 35 damage per hit.

items.name: Trip Wire
items.description: Use this item to lay a trip wire.  It will slowly disappear and trip anyone (but you) that walks over it.  They'll take quite a bit of damage with the fall.

items.name: Mega Annoying Megaphone
items.description: It's not just a megaphone, it's mega annoying!

items.name: The Blade of the Federation
items.description: The official weapon used in the Wars of Reunification.

items.name: 2018 Fireworks
items.description: Happy 2018!!

items.name: Lincoln's Golden Rail Splitter
items.description: Split any brick into dozens of pieces!  May or may not actually split bricks.

items.name: Nuclear Winter Icicle Gun
items.description: Your February 2010 Winter Contest entry was so hot, it was radioactive!

items.name: Katana of Destiny
items.description: Do you fulfill the sword's destiny or does it help you fulfill yours?
